MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIOSSO, GUIDO SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-03-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 02 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-10-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINO, INEZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 84 ALPHA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA. $3,520.00 RENT, $950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,470.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABAN- DONED. SECURITY DEPOSIT, IF ANY, IS FORFEITED TO PLTF. DEFT TO PAY $300 PER MONTH STARTING 4/1/94. IF DEFT COMPLIES WITH ALL CONDITIONS, PLTF ATTY WILL FILE A STIP TO VACATE JUDGMNT WITH THE COURT.
